name: Holiday Dinner Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Butter or margarine, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except Glaze into bread machine pan in the order suggested by manufacturer.
2. Process in dough/manual cycle.
3. When cycle is complete, remove dough to lightly floured surface. If necessary, knead in enough flour to make dough easy to handle.
4. Divide dough into 8 (12 for 1-1/2 lb) equal pieces.
5. Divide each into 3 equal pieces; roll into balls, making 24 (36) balls.
6. Place 3 balls in each section of 8 (12) greased 2-1/2-inch muffin pan cups.
7. Cover, let rise in warm, draft-free place until doubled in size, about 30 to 45 minutes.
8. Brush Egg Glaze on rolls.
9. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes or until done. Remove from cups; cool on wire rack.
